title: First Morning in a New City
author: hand-authored sample
premise: You just arrived by train in a city where everyone speaks English. It is early morning. Find a coffee, then find the museum.
_note_l1: l1Hint values are Japanese (Garak teaches mostly Japanese students); the L1 is configurable per student/campaign.

targetLanguageBank.l1Hint: ありがとうございます (arigatou gozaimasu)
〜はどこですか (~wa doko desu ka)
知りませんでした (shirimasen deshita)

spellPool.name: Get Out of Jail Free
spellPool.flavor: Talk your way out of trouble - once.

upgradeBeat.writePrompt: Apologize politely and explain that you are a tourist.
upgradeBeat.upgradedEffectText: You walk free AND keep your photos.

spellPool.name: Foresight
spellPool.flavor: Glimpse how hard a task is before you try it.

baseEffect.text: Reveal the difficulty before you roll.

spellPool.name: Silver Tongue
spellPool.flavor: Charm your way past one social check.

n_arrive.text: You step off the train into a bright, busy square. You are tired and you want a coffee.

choices.label: Walk to the little coffee stand

writeIn.prompt: Greet the seller and order a coffee in English.

onSuccess.text: The seller smiles and hands you a warm cup.

onFailure.text: You fumble the words, but she guesses and gives you a coffee anyway.

onSuccess.text: You get your bearings and head for the main square.

n_square.text: In the main square, an old stone building glows in the morning light. You want to visit the museum.

choices.label: Ask a passer-by for directions to the museum

writeIn.prompt: Politely ask where the museum is.

onSuccess.text: 'The museum? Go left, then right,' they say with a smile.

onFailure.text: They shrug and hurry off, pointing vaguely to the left.

choices.label: Take photos of the beautiful old building

hiddenTrap.clue: A small unmarked door has a little black camera blinking above it.

n_police.text: Two officers step out fast. 'No photos here! Delete them and come with us.'

choices.label: Apologize and explain you didn't know

writeIn.prompt: Apologize and explain you are a tourist who didn't know the rule.

onSuccess.text: They soften. 'Okay - delete the photos and go.'

onFailure.text: They are not convinced and walk you to the station for an hour.

n_release.text: You delete the photos and walk away, heart pounding.

n_release_free.text: You say exactly the right words. The officers nod, almost friendly, and wave you on - photos and all.

n_detained.text: An hour later you are free again, a little shaken but fine.

n_street.text: You turn left, then right, and there it is: the museum, doors open.

n_end.endingSummary: You made it through your first morning in the city - coffee in hand and the museum found!
n_end.text: Warm light spills across the museum lobby. Your first morning is a success.
